prompt: Create an elegant high-fantasy character design sheet in a refined wuxia/xianxia style on a clean ivory background with a thin ornate vintage border. The layout is a split showcase with 5 visible panels: 1 large full-body panel on the left, 1 tall upper-right portrait close-up, and 3 stacked/lower detail panels on the right showing armor and weapon craftsmanship. The main subject is a handsome adult male swordsman, original character, with long flowing black hair tied in a half-up topknot, the rest loose and wind-swept, wearing a small gold earring. His expression is calm, noble, and slightly aloof. He wears luxurious layered robes in white, deep navy blue, and black, with wide sleeves, flowing sashes, and highly detailed gold embroidery. Over the shoulders and torso are ornate dark blue and black armor elements with elaborate gold filigree and dragon-like decorative metalwork, plus a jade-green gemstone set into the waist ornament and weapon fittings. In the full-body panel he stands in a poised three-quarter stance holding a long straight jian sword diagonally downward, with the robe hems and ribbons flowing gracefully to suggest motion. The costume should include exactly 6 standout outfit elements: white inner robe, dark blue outer robe panels, black underlayer trousers, wide black-and-gold waist belt, sculpted gold shoulder armor, and black bracers with gold detailing. The right-side close-up portrait emphasizes the layered collar, glossy hair texture, shoulder ornament, and elegant fabric rendering. The 3 detail panels show exactly these focus areas: a gold dragon-like waist armor emblem, a jade-set sword guard or accessory ornament, and a close-up of the ornate gold sword hilt and guard with part of the blade. Overall aesthetic: ultra-detailed concept art, stylish and polished, crisp linework blended with painterly rendering, premium character-sheet presentation, soft neutral studio lighting, subtle shadows, luxurious textures, and a restrained palette of ivory, midnight blue, black, gold, and jade green.
